28:["$","h2",null,{"className":"mb-6 scroll-m-16 font-normal uppercase text-xl tracking-[.1rem] text-[#141414] [&:not(:first-child)]:mt-16","id":"add-nextjs-middleware","children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"#add-nextjs-middleware","className":"font-light text-neutral-900 underline transition-all hover:text-[#008000] anchor","target":"_self","aria-label":"Link to section","children":["$","span",null,{"className":"icon icon-link"}]}],"Add Next.js Middleware"]}]
29:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Rather than requiring authentication in each of our private pages or components, we will implement our auth with ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/routing/middleware","className":"font-light text-neutral-900 underline transition-all hover:text-[#008000]","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer","children":"Next.js Middleware"}],", which will allow us to specify which routes we want to make private."]}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["There are several benefits to this approach. The primary benefit is that it enables client-side handling of authentication and authorization in our ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"Next.js"}]," application, as opposed to server-side handling in our ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"Express.js"}]," server."]}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"If we were to handle authentication on the server, we would need to send a request each time a user navigated to a new page. Consequently, our client-side application would also need to wait for our server to responds to each of those requests before allowing a user to actually view any content. You can imagine how this might become an unesary drag on performance."}]
2c:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Furthermore, the use of middleware allows us to keep our auth logic separate from our other ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"application"}]," logic. This separation of concerns is a good design choice as the ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-normal text-neutral-600","children":"modularity"}]," reduces cognitive load, and if, later, we decide to change auth managers, we only have to update one file as opposed to having to update every private page/component in our application."]}]
2d:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] text-[#777777]","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mt-2 font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Create a new ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"client/src/middleware.ts"}]," file and add the following:"]}],"\n"]}]
2e:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center text-sm","data-line-numbers":"","data-language":"ts","data-theme":"default","data-line-numbers-max-digits":"1","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"import"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"{"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#E1F3E7"},"children":"withMiddlewareAuthRequired"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"}"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" 49:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"server/src/middleware/authMiddleware.ts"}],["$","$L7f",null,{"text":"import 'dotenv/config';\n\nimport { GetVerificationKey, expressjwt as jwt } from 'express-jwt';\nimport jwksRsa from 'jwks-rsa';\nconst issuerBaseUrl = process.env.AUTH0_ISSUER_BASE_URL;\nconst audience = process.env.AUTH0_AUDIENCE || 'http://localhost:5000/';\n\nexport const checkJwt = jwt({\n  secret: jwksRsa.expressJwtSecret({\n    cache: true,\n    rateLimit: true,\n    jwksRequestsPerMinute: 5,\n    jwksUri: `${issuerBaseUrl}/.well-known/jwks.json`,\n  }) as GetVerificationKey,\n  audience: audience,\n  issuer: `${issuerBaseUrl}/`,\n  algorithms: ['RS256'],\n});\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 group relative m-0 overflow-x-auto rounded-md 4c:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"server/src/app.ts"}],["$","$L7f",null,{"text":"import cookieParser from 'cookie-parser';\nimport express from 'express';\nimport flash from 'express-flash';\nimport morgan from 'morgan';\nimport {\n  generalErrorHandler,\n  notFoundHandler,\n} from './middleware/errorMiddleware';\nimport routes from './routes/index';\nimport { checkJwt } from './middleware/authMiddleware';\n\nconst app = express();\n\napp.use(morgan('dev'));\napp.use(express.json());\napp.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: false }));\napp.use(cookieParser());\napp.use(flash());\n\napp.use('/api', checkJwt, routes);\n\napp.use(notFoundHandler);\napp.use(generalErrorHandler);\n\nexport default app;\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 group relative m-0 overflow-x-auto rounded-md 4d:["$","div",null,{"className":"my-8 flex items-center rounded border border-gray-200 bg-[#F8F9FA] px-4 py-2 text-sm text-[#777777]","children":["",["$","div",null,{"className":"w-full","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"You could apply the auth middleware to individual routes instead with something like this:"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center  justify-between rounded-t-md border-b !border-b-gray-700 bg-[#121212] px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm font-medium text-neutral-200 ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"server/src/routes/index.ts"}],["$","$L7f",null,{"text":"import { Router } from 'express';\nimport asyncHandler from 'express-async-handler';\nimport { checkJwt } from '../middleware/authMiddleware';\n\nconst router = Router();\n\nrouter.get(\n  '/',\n  checkJwt,\n  asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {\n    res.status(200).send('Server Running...');\n  })\n);\n\nrouter.get(\n  '/private-route',\n  checkJwt,\n  asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {\n    res.status(200).send({ message: 'This is a private route' });\n  })\n);\n\nexport default router;\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 group relative m-0 'cookie-parser';\nimport express from 'express';\nimport flash from 'express-flash';\nimport morgan from 'morgan';\nimport {\n  generalErrorHandler,\n  notFoundHandler,\n} from './middleware/errorMiddleware';\nimport routes from './routes/index';\nimport { checkJwt } from './middleware/authMiddleware';\n\nconst app = express();\nconst baseUrl = process.env.AUTH0_BASE_URL;\n\napp.use(morgan('dev'));\napp.use(cors({ origin: baseUrl }));\napp.use(express.json());\napp.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: false }));\napp.use(cookieParser());\napp.use(flash());\n\napp.use('/api', checkJwt, routes);\n\napp.use(notFoundHandler);\napp.use(generalErrorHandler);\n\nexport default 5e:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["We ",["$","em",null,{"children":"could"}]," get the access token in a server component and pass it as props to our client component. That would work, but it wouldn't be the most secure solution since we would be sending the auth token to the client."]}]
5f:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["A more secure solution is to add the authToken to our API Request's headers, in our frontend middleware, before ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"rewriting"}]," our requests to our backend API."]}]

63:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] text-[#777777]","start":"2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mt-2 font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Import React's ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"useState"}]," hook and write a ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"callApi()"}]," function that fetches data from our Express server."]}],"\n"]}]
64:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center  justify-between rounded-t-md border-b !border-b-gray-700 bg-[#121212] px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm font-medium text-neutral-200 ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"client/src/app/private/page.tsx"}],["$","$L7f",null,{"text":"import { useState } from 'react';\n\nexport default function PrivatePage() {\n  const [state, setState] = useState({\n    isLoading: false,\n    response: undefined,\n    error: undefined,\n  });\n\n  const callApi = async () => {\n    setState((previous) => ({ ...previous, isLoading: true }));\n\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch('/api/private-route');\n      const data = await response.json();\n\n      setState((previous) => ({\n        ...previous,\n        response: data,\n        error: undefined,\n      }));\n    } catch (error) {\n      setState((previous) => ({\n        ...previous,\n        response: undefined,\n        error,\n      }));\n    } finally {\n      setState((previous) => ({ ...previous, isLoading: false }));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const { isLoading, response, error } = state;\n  ...\n}\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 group relative m-0 overflow-x-auto rounded-md py-4","data-language":"tsx","data-theme":"default","__withmeta__":"false","children":[["$","$L7f",null,{}],["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","data-line-numbers":"","data-language":"tsx","data-theme":"default","data-line-numbers-max-digits":"2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"line line--highlighted","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"import"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"{"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#E1F3E7"},"children":"useState"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":"<>"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":" 69:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Your fully updated ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"Private"}]," page should look like this:"]}]
118:T508,'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';

export default function PrivatePage() {
  const [state, setState] = useState({
    isLoading: false,
    response: undefined,
    error: undefined,
  });

  const callApi = async () => {
    setState((previous) => ({ ...previous, isLoading: true }));

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/private-route');
      const data = await response.json();

      setState((previous) => ({
        ...previous,
        response: data,
        error: undefined,
      }));
    } catch (error) {
      setState((previous) => ({
        ...previous,
        response: undefined,
        error,
      }));
    } finally {
      setState((previous) => ({ ...previous, isLoading: false }));
    }
  };

  const { isLoading, response, error } = state;

  if (!isLoading) {
    return (
      <>
        <h1 className="mt-10 text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-6xl">
          Private Page
        </h1>

        <button
          onClick={callApi}
          className="mt-10 block rounded bg-pink-800/50 px-2 py-1 text-white hover:opacity-70"
        >
          Call API
        </button>

        <div className="mt-20">
          {response && <div>{JSON.stringify(response)}</div>}
        </div>
      </>
    );
  }
}

"}],"$L119","$L11a","$L11b","$L11c","$L11d","$L11e","$L11f","$L120","$L121","$L122","$L123","$L124","$L125","$L126"]}],"\n","$L127","\n","$L128","\n","$L129","\n","$L12a","\n","$L12b","\n","$L12c","\n","$L12d","\n","$L12e","\n","$L12f","\n","$L130","\n","$L131","\n","$L132","\n","$L133","\n","$L134","\n","$L135","\n","$L136","\n","$L137","\n","$L138","\n","$L139","\n","$L13a","\n","$L13b","\n","$L13c","\n","$L13d","\n","$L13e","\n","$L13f","\n","$L140","\n","$L141","\n","$L142","\n","$L143","\n","$L144","\n","$L145","\n","$L146","\n","$L147","\n","$L148","\n","$L149","\n","$L14a","\n","$L14b","\n","$L14c","\n","$L14d","\n","$L14e","\n","$L14f","\n","$L150","\n","$L151","\n","$L152","\n","$L153","\n","$L154","\n","$L155","\n","$L156","\n","$L157","\n","$L158","\n","$L159"]}]]}]}]]}]

6f:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] text-[#777777]","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mt-2 font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["Create a custom middleware function and pass it as an argument to the existing ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"withMiddlewareAuthRequired()"}]," function."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":["The new custom middleware function should take in a ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"NextRequest"}]," object, copy any existing headers over to a new ",["$","code",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm","children":"NextResponse"}]," object."]}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}]
70:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"client/src/middleware.ts"}],["$","$L7f",null,{"text":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';\n\nexport default withMiddlewareAuthRequired(function middleware(\n  req: NextRequest,\n) {\n  if (req.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith('/api/auth')) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const requestHeaders = new Headers(req.headers);\n  const user = await getSession(\n    req,\n    NextResponse.next({\n      request: {\n        headers: requestHeaders,\n      },\n    }),\n  );\n  requestHeaders.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${user?.idToken}`);\n});\n...\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#E1F3E7"},"children":"NextRequest"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":","}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#769BAA"},"children":"req"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#83A06C"},"children":":"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#D4D4D4"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#C78547"},"children":"NextRequest"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"#ADC586"},"children":","}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line 72:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center '@auth0/nextjs-auth0/edge';\n\n...\n\n// Be sure to add the `async` modifier to your function\nexport default withMiddlewareAuthRequired(async function middleware(\n  req: NextRequest\n) {\n  if 75:["$","p",null,{"className":"font-open-sans text-[0.94rem] font-light text-[#777777]","children":"The fully updated middleware will look like this:"}]
76:["$","div",null,{"className":"remark-code-container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex p-0","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"code-header  flex h-12 w-full items-center  justify-between rounded-t-md border-b !border-b-gray-700 bg-[#121212] px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm font-medium text-neutral-200 ","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"truncate","children":"client/src/middleware.ts"}],["$","$L7f",null,{"text":"import {\n  getSession,\n  withMiddlewareAuthRequired,\n} from '@auth0/nextjs-auth0/edge';\nimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';\n\nexport default withMiddlewareAuthRequired(async function middleware(\n  req: NextRequest,\n) {\n  if (req.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith('/api/auth')) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const requestHeaders = new Headers(req.headers);\n  const user = await getSession(\n    req,\n    NextResponse.next({\n      request: {\n        headers: requestHeaders,\n      },\n    }),\n  );\n  requestHeaders.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${user?.idToken}`);\n\n  const response = NextResponse.next({\n    request: {\n      headers: requestHeaders,\n    },\n  });\n  return response;\n});\n\nexport const config = {\n  matcher: ['/private/:path*', '/api/:path*'],\n};\n","isTitle":true}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment":"","children":["$","pre",null,{"className":"px-0 group relative m-0 overflow-x-auto rounded-md We covered topics such as setting up a custom backend server, configuring Auth0 for authentication, and integrating the backend with the frontend using rewrites and middleware. By following the steps outlined in this tutorial, you should now have a solid understanding of how to integrate Next.js with Express.js using Auth0 for authentication."}]
